content.en:
Although the imprint of the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Sword had long since dissipated, Ye Tian could still remember the wisps of the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Sword, and it would have a little effect if he continued to comprehend.

And in the years that followed, he worked hard to create other Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Peerless Sects and Eighth Dimensional Will Peerless Realms.

Finally, after more than a hundred extradimensional eras, he successfully created the second four-realm multi-dimensional mastery.

This second multi-dimensional mastery is based on a little bit of the skin of the ten-dimensional heavenly sword, not an attack-type four-realm multi-dimensional mastery, but a four-realm multi-dimensional mastery that can increase speed, and can turn into a sword light, break through all shackles, and exert the speed to the extreme.

Ye Tian named this four-realm multi-dimensional mastery - eight-dimensional tribulation!

The faster the speed, the more you can increase your attack, so with the eight-dimensional robbery, it is enough to make the attack power of the gravel robbery more powerful.

Therefore, since the creation of the Eight-Dimensional Tribulation Light, Ye Tian's strength has increased a little, but it is still extremely far from breaking through the fifth level of the Ten-Dimensional Heaven Gate.

Ye Tian estimated that he needed his own extra-dimensional rules to improve a little more.19 By the way, he would raise the realm of the Ka Ye Wisdom Body and the Wu Mu Body, or refine it into an innate multi-dimensional Dao body.

After some years passed, Ye Tian's Jiaye wisdom body had been promoted to the second layer of the Dacheng Limit Realm, and the Wumu Body was about to break through to the second layer of the Dacheng realm.

"The cultivation of the Ka Ye wisdom body has reached the limit of the second layer of Dacheng, and I don't have the inheritance of the third layer in my hands, so I have to find a way to obtain the inheritance of the third layer!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, there are not many forces in the 4000th Territory that have the inheritance of the Ka Ye Wisdom Body, and among them is the force that holds the Ka Ye Wisdom Tree, the Ka Ye Buddha Gate.

The Buddha Gate of the Buddha Leaf has three fifth realms and a large number of fourth realms, and it is also an incomparably ancient power, and there are many multi-dimensional tribulations that exist.

And even in the Kasa Buddha Gate, it is difficult to obtain the third layer of inheritance, at least it is only after joining the Ka Ye Buddha Sect for countless years, and even a core member of a multi-dimensional tribulation, can it be hoped to obtain.

Even if he joins the Kasa Buddha Sect, and the Kasa Buddha Sect accepts him, it is impossible for him to obtain the Kasa Leaf Wisdom Body Inheritance!

"Let's still have to inquire and see who has the inheritance of the third layer of the Ka Ye wisdom body!"

Ye Tian said so secretly.

In the days that followed, while cultivating, he inquired about the inheritance of the third layer of the Ka Ye wisdom body and other innate multi-dimensional Dao body inheritances.

this day.

The Extinction Realm Lord contacted Ye Tian.

The two of them agreed to meet somewhere in Territory 4500.

Soon, they met.

"Extinction Realm Lord, do you have the inheritance of the third layer of the Ka Ye Wisdom Body in your hands?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Extinction Realm Lord shook his head: "I don't have the inheritance of the third layer of the Ka Ye Wisdom Body in my hands. "

Just when Ye Tian was disappointed, the Extinction Realm Lord said again: "But I know where I have the inheritance of the third layer of the Jiaye Wisdom Body, and even know about other innate multi-dimensional Dao body inheritances. "

When Ye Tian heard this, he was immediately interested.

"Where?"

He hurriedly asked.

The Extinction Realm Lord smiled and said, "Ye Tian Realm Lord, we are a deal, I can say it, but what can you come up with?"

"The location of a inheritance place of the Lord of the Wumu Realm, as well as related information, there are many treasures such as the inheritance of the body of the Wumu, the secret method of the three blacks, and even the will of the master!"

When the Extinction Realm Lord heard about the inheritance of the Wumu Realm Lord at this moment, he was immediately excited.

The Wumu Realm Lord is the existence of the legendary Sixth Realm, and now the Four Thousand Territory does not even have a Sixth Realm, if he obtains the inheritance of the Wumu Realm Lord, even the most ordinary inheritance, it is enough to make his strength skyrocket, and increase his hope of breaking through to the Fifth Realm!

"Okay, let's trade!" The Extinction Realm Lord was afraid that Ye Tian would regret it.

Afterwards.

"It's so far away in the middle of nowhere!"

The Lord of the Extinction Realm was surprised.

Six Thousand Six Hundred and Eleven Territory, such a remote territory, how could he go to the fourth realm like this, where the energy is barren and the resources are scarce, and the third realm can't even look down on!

Unexpectedly, the lord of the Wumu Realm actually left a legacy there.

Then, he said goodbye to Ye Tian and went to the territory of 6611.

......

"According to what the Lord of the Extinct Realm said, the easiest place to obtain the inheritance of the third layer of the Jiaye wisdom body is the Qingya family, an ancestor of the Qingya family failed to hit the fifth realm during the last multidimensional tribulation, and that ancestor cultivated the Jiaye wisdom body to the third layer, and the Qingya family still retains the inheritance of the Jiaye wisdom body!"

Ye Tian was ready to go to the Qingya family.

And the Lord of the Extinction Realm also briefly talked about the strength of the Qingya family, since the last multi-dimensional tribulation, the Qingya family has declined, and during this period, it has experienced many life and death tribulations, and even the name of the family has changed many times, and now there is only one fourth realm and a few third realms, which is simply not worth mentioning compared to the peak period.

It was only by chance that the Lord of the Extinction Realm learned that the Green Tooth Family was a descendant of the Fourth Realm, and only then did he learn that the Green Tooth Family had the inheritance of the third layer of the Ka Ye Wisdom Body.

It's just that the Extinction Realm Lord didn't cultivate the Ka Ye Wisdom Body, and he didn't have the Three Wu Secret Method, and he didn't dare to cultivate the Second 017 Innate Multidimensional Dao Body, so he didn't have much interest in the Ka Ye Wisdom Body.

Soon.

Ye Tian arrived at the territory where the Qingya family was located.

Subsequently, he visited the Qingya family.

For a visit from the Fourth Realm, the Qingya family did not dare to refuse.

For this reason, the only ancestor of the middle stage of the Fourth Realm, the Qingju Realm Master, who had been in retreat and penance cultivation in the Qingya family, came out of the customs to meet Ye Tian.

"I am the Lord of the Ye Heaven Realm, and I have seen the Lord of the Qingju Realm!"

Ye Tian said politely.

"It turned out to be the Lord of the Ye Heaven Realm, don't you know what happened to visit our Qingya family?"

The Qingju Realm Lord looked a little nervous, although Ye Tian's cultivation was only in the middle of the Fourth Realm, but the faint aura that emanated made him feel suffocated.

Obviously, Ye Tian's strength was terrifying, far surpassing the normal mid-stage powerhouse of the Fourth Realm, and it was definitely above him.

"I want to trade the third layer inheritance of the Ka Ye wisdom body of the Green Fang Family!"

Ye Tian directly stated his purpose.

As soon as these words came out, the face of the Qingju Realm Lord changed.

She never expected that the hidden inheritance of the Leaf Wisdom Body of the Qingya Family would be exposed.

You must know that even in the Qingya family, only a very small number of third realms are qualified to cultivate the Ka Ye wisdom body, how did it leak out?
